category_title: Preschoolers engaging in loud, chaotic, 'trashing' play
scenario_title: Task resistance and avoidance during clean-up transition
minimal_context: The teacher instructs the preschoolers to clean up the dumped toys and get dressed at the end of their play session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The game is over. It is time to clean up the toys and put your clothes back on.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Trudging slowly and wearily) I don't know how to put things away.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Still sitting without clothes on after playing the animal game) I'm hungry.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Complaining and taking considerable time to get dressed) I need to use the toilet.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: The game is over. It is time to clean up the toys and put your clothes back on.

STUDENT: (Trudging slowly and wearily) I don't know how to put things away.

TUTOR: Just start picking them up.

STUDENT: (Still sitting without clothes on after playing the animal game) I'm hungry.

TUTOR: Please get dressed first.

STUDENT: (Complaining and taking considerable time to get dressed) I need to use the toilet.

task.content: Responding to the teacher's instruction to clean up the 'trashing' mess and get dressed after the 'Sleeping Family Game'.

context.environment: Classroom play area, surrounded by indiscriminately dumped small toys, plastic food, and removed clothing.
context.materials: Massive pile of dumped toys, plastic food, dress-up clothes, and the children's own removed clothing and shoes.
context.social_setting: Group of preschoolers transitioning out of free play.
context.time_context: At the end of the 'Sleeping Family Game' when the teacher breaks up the escalating unruliness.

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher announced that it was time to clean up.
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The formerly energetic children trudged slowly and wearily and complained that they did not know how to put things away, and that they were hungry or needed to use the toilet.

behavior_patterns.condition: When required to put their clothes back on after the game ends.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: It took considerable time to get everyone dressed again after they had removed their clothes to become joyous animals.
